holdings.infoBox: SPGM is an equity ETF with a total of 2978 individual holdings. The top holdings are NVIDIA stock at 4.31%, Apple at 3.76%, Microsoft at 2.46%, Amazon.com at 1.96%, and Alphabet at 1.87%.

overview.description: The State Street SPDR Portfolio MSCI Global Stock Market ETF (SPGM) is an exchange-traded fund that is based on the MSCI AC World IMI index, a market-cap-weighted index of global stocks covering 99% of the developed and emerging markets capitalization. SPGM was launched on Feb 27, 2012 and is issued by State Street.
